name: North Coast Auto Mall
description_short: Used car dealership in Cleveland, OH specializing in financing for buyers with poor or bad credit. Offers in-house buy-here-pay-here financing options.
description_long:
North Coast Auto Mall of Cleveland is a used car dealership established in 2009, located at 5700 Brookpark Road in West Cleveland. The dealership has served over 12,000 customers and positions itself as a one-stop-shop for used vehicles combined with specialized financing solutions. The business operates a physical sales and service center in the Brookpark area, accessible to customers throughout the mid-Ohio region including Columbus, Akron, and Bedford.

The company offers a broad inventory of used vehicles across multiple categories including sedans, SUVs, trucks, and electric vehicles. Their inventory spans brands from luxury (Audi, Acura) to mainstream (Toyota, Hyundai) to commercial (RAM, Chevy, GMC). They provide tiered pricing options with dedicated inventory categories for vehicles under $10,000, under $15,000, and under $20,000. Primary financing offerings include traditional auto loans and proprietary "buy here pay here" financing, marketed specifically toward customers with poor credit scores or no credit history.

North Coast Auto Mall distinguishes itself through specialization in subprime auto lending and commitment to serving credit-challenged borrowers. Their website emphasizes "poor credit car help" and frames the dealership as understanding that affordability is a primary factor for many buyers. They offer pre-qualification tools, a dedicated finance center, and claim to work with customers "no matter your credit history." They also provide ancillary services including vehicle service/maintenance, trade-in options, and vehicle protection plans.

The company operates a legitimate dealership model with physical infrastructure, service capabilities, and transparent contact information. However, as a buy-here-pay-here and subprime lender, borrowers should expect higher interest rates, shorter loan terms, and potentially GPS tracking or payment collection mechanisms common to this financing model. The website does not disclose specific APR ranges, loan terms, or fee structures.
pros: Established dealership since 2009 with over 12,000 customers served, indicating longevity and customer base
Wide inventory spanning multiple vehicle types (sedans, SUVs, trucks, EVs) and price tiers ($10K, $15K, $20K categories)
Specializes in financing for poor credit and no-credit borrowers, removing barriers for credit-challenged consumers
On-site service center for vehicle maintenance and repairs, providing post-purchase support
Buy-here-pay-here financing option allows in-house payment arrangements without traditional credit intermediaries
Pre-qualification tool available online to assess financing options before dealership visit
Located in accessible West Cleveland area with broad regional reach to mid-Ohio customers
cons: Website does not disclose APR, loan terms, down payment requirements, or fee structures for either traditional or BHPH financing
Buy-here-pay-here model typically involves GPS tracking, starter interrupt devices, and higher costs of capital compared to traditional auto lending
No transparent information about default rates, repossession policies, or customer complaint resolution processes
Marketing heavily targets subprime borrowers, which may indicate predatory lending practices common to this segment
Limited information about vehicle history, inspection standards, or warranty offerings on used inventory
best_for: Buyers with poor or bad credit seeking vehicle financing without traditional credit approval
Consumers in the Cleveland/mid-Ohio area needing affordable used vehicles under $20,000
Drivers requiring immediate vehicle access without credit repair or application delays
Buyers seeking in-house financing with payment flexibility through buy-here-pay-here arrangements
diagnosis: North Coast Auto Mall is best for credit-impaired buyers in the Cleveland area seeking used vehicles with flexible in-house financing. The primary caveat is that buy-here-pay-here financing typically carries significantly higher costs and payment collection mechanisms (GPS tracking, starter interrupt devices) than traditional auto loans, and the dealership does not publicly disclose APR, terms, or fee structures—requiring direct inquiry before committing.
services: Used vehicle sales (sedans, SUVs, trucks, electric vehicles)
Poor credit car help and financing
Car loan FAQs and financial education
Vehicle inventory search by type, year, make, model
